# meltcloud_elastic_capacity (Data Source)

An Elastic Capacity is a pool of compute resources on a cluster which can be sliced into Elastic Shares for consumption by other organizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# get elastic capacity by ID
data "meltcloud_elastic_capacity" "example" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Internal ID of the Elastic Capacity on meltcloud

### Read-Only

- `cluster_id` (Number) ID of the associated cluster
- `name` (String) Name of the Elastic Capacity
- `status` (String) Status of the Elastic Capacity
